messages.content:
Bot1 <Event>: I have picked up:
- 1 Stone Sword
- 1 Bow
- 24 Arrow
- 1 Leather Tunic
- 12 Bread
- 40 Oak Planks

arguments.message: Good pickup! We're now fully equipped. Both bots should stay close and monitor for hostile spawns. I'll keep watch and we'll defend together if anything appears.

messages.content: Me <MESSAGE to Bot2>: "Good pickup! We're now fully equipped. Both bots should stay close and monitor for hostile spawns. I'll keep watch and we'll defend together if anything appears."

Bot1 <Event>: Multiple new hostile mobs are approaching:
- zombie id 15 is 4.0 blocks away
- zombie id 16 is 3.2 blocks away
Me <STOPPED>: Already within 2 blocks of player.
Bot2 <MESSAGE>: Warning! Hostile zombies are approaching - one at 5.1 blocks and one at 3.9 blocks. Need to prepare for defense.

arguments.name: attack_nearest_hostile
arguments.description: Engage the nearest hostile mob within range using current weapon, or kite if overwhelmed

messages.content: Me <STOPPED>: Already within 2 blocks of player.

Me <NEW ACTION>: Created attack_nearest_hostile and executed it with {"maxSearchRadius":8,"engageDistance":2.5,"weaponName":"stone_sword","kiteHealthThreshold":8}. <STARTED>: Engaging nearby hostiles (kite threshold: 8 hp).

Bot1 <Event>: The following hostile mobs are no longer a threat:
- zombie id 16

arguments.name: attack_hostile_by_id
arguments.description: Attack a specific hostile mob using current weapon

messages.content: Me <STARTED>: Moving toward player Bot2 to distance 2.

Me <NEW ACTION>: Created attack_hostile_by_id and executed it with {"targetEntityId":15,"weaponName":"stone_sword","maxDistanceBlocks":16,"stopIfHealthDropsBelow":8}. <STARTED>: Attacking hostile entity 15 with health threshold 8.
Bot2 <MESSAGE>: Hostiles neutralized! All clear for now. Both bots should stay close and continue monitoring for new spawns.

Bot1 <Event>: The following hostile mobs are no longer a threat:
- zombie id 15
Me <STARTED>: Moving toward player Bot2 to stay within 2 blocks.

Bot1 <Event>: Multiple new hostile mobs are approaching:
- zombie id 17 is 4.0 blocks away
- zombie id 18 is 3.5 blocks away
- zombie id 19 is 4.4 blocks away
- zombie id 20 is 4.7 blocks away
Me <STARTED>: Engaging nearby hostiles (kite threshold: 8 hp).
Bot2 <MESSAGE>: New hostile mob wave detected! Zombies at 3.5, 8.3, 2.3, and 2.3 blocks. Will engage the closest threats first.
Me <STARTED>: Moving toward player Bot2 to stay within 2 blocks.
Bot2 <MESSAGE>: CRITICAL: Health dropped to 5.5! Need to kite and use bow for ranged damage. Zombies are still approaching.

Bot1 <Event>: I just took damage.
- Health changed from 20.0 to 12.3 (7.7 lost)

arguments.name: attack_hostile_with_bow
arguments.description: Attack nearest hostile mob with bow and arrow, dealing ranged damage

messages.content: Me <NEW ACTION>: Created attack_hostile_with_bow and executed it with {"engageDistance":12,"maxDurationMs":5000,"maxSearchRadius":15,"maxShots":5,"holdDrawMs":1100}. <STARTED>: Searching for hostiles to shoot with bow. Target identified: zombie.
Me <STARTED>: Moving toward player Bot2 to stay within 2 blocks.

Bot1 <Event>: My health is low!
- Health changed from 12.3 to 4.8 (7.5 lost)

arguments.name: kite_nearest_hostile
arguments.description: Back away from the nearest hostile while using bow for ranged attacks and keeping distance

arguments.message: Kiting! Using bow at range. Stay near for safety. I'm at low health!

messages.content: Me <NEW ACTION>: Created kite_nearest_hostile and executed it with {"maxDurationMs":8000,"minHealth":6,"preferredDistance":8,"retreatStepBlocks":2,"holdDrawMs":1100}. <UNSAFE>: Health is already below 6.
Me <MESSAGE to Bot2>: "Kiting! Using bow at range. Stay near for safety. I'm at low health!"
